item.title: Projects
item.description: InsecureShop InsecureShop is an Android application that is designed to be intentionally vulnerable. The aim of creating this app is to teach developers and security professionals about the vulnerabilities that are present in modern Android applications. This also serves as a platform to test your Android pentesting skills. Github: https://www.insecureshopapp.com/ Mobile Nuclei Templates The creators of Nuclei tool had recently introduced File requests feature that scans ‘local files’ using matching and extracting capabilities.

item.title: About Me 👨🏻‍💻
item.description: I’m yet another offensive security guy who is passionate about Cyber Security. I greatly enjoy finding vulnerabilities in different products and services and reporting these to the respective vendors before such vulnerabilities fall into the wrong hands. I love offensive security research, and over the past few years, I have researched several attack vectors in mobile applications. My research led me to author “InsecureShop Vulnerable Android Application”. Also, I have created several “Mobile nuclei templates” to automate vulnerability identification in mobile applications.
